h3.a: BII commits $50m to TLG Capital's Africa Credit Opportunities Fund II

article.p: British International Investment has committed $50m to TLG Capital's Africa Credit Opportunities Fund II, targeting African SME lending in financial inclusion.

h3.a: BII approves GBP 30m commitment to Helios Climate Tech III

article.p: Project: Helios Climate Tech III. Commitment GBP 30m. Sector: Climate. Geography: Africa (multi-country).
